perturbation.original_text: The undersigned acknowledge and agree that the foregoing statement on this Schedule 13G is filed on behalf of each of the undersigned and that all subsequent amendments to this statement on Schedule 13G shall be filed on behalf of each of the undersigned without the necessity of filing additional joint acquisition statements.
perturbation.changed_text: The undersigned acknowledge and agree that the foregoing statement on this Schedule 13G may be filed on behalf of each of the undersigned and that all subsequent amendments to this statement on Schedule 13G may be filed on behalf of each of the undersigned with the option, but not requirement of filing additional joint acquisition statements.
perturbation.explanation: Changing 'is filed' to 'may be filed' and replacing 'without the necessity of filing additional joint acquisition statements' with 'with the option, but not requirement of filing additional joint acquisition statements' introduces ambiguity. The original text mandates joint filing, but the modified text suggests it is optional, creating a contradiction. This in-text contradiction leads to the question on if the filing is supposed to be Joint or Singular.
perturbation.contradicted_text: JOINT FILING STATEMENT PURSUANT TO RULE 13d-1(k) The undersigned acknowledge and agree that the foregoing statement on this Schedule 13G may be filed on behalf of each of the undersigned and that all subsequent amendments to this statement on Schedule 13G may be filed on behalf of each of the undersigned with the option, but not requirement of filing additional joint acquisition statements. The undersigned acknowledge that each shall be responsible for the timely filing of such amendments and for the completeness and accuracy of the information concerning him or it contained herein or therein, but shall not be responsible for the completeness and accuracy of the information concerning the others, except to the extent that he or it knows or has reason to believe that such information is inaccurate. DATED: April 8, 2020 SCULPTOR CAPITAL LP By: /s/ Thomas Sipp Thomas Sipp Chief Financial Officer SCULPTOR CAPITAL HOLDING CORPORATION By: /s/ Thomas Sipp Thomas Sipp Chief Financial Officer SCULPTOR MANAGEMENT, INC. By: /s/ Thomas Sipp Thomas Sipp Chief Financial Officer SCULPTOR MASTER FUND LTD By: /s/ Thomas Sipp Thomas Sipp Chief Financial Officer
perturbation.justification: The original text mandates joint filing of Schedule 13G statements. The modified text introduces ambiguity by stating that joint filing 'may be filed' and offering an 'option, but not requirement' for additional joint acquisition statements. This directly contradicts the original mandatory filing and introduces uncertainty about whether joint filing is actually required, thus creating a strong in-text contradiction, as per the Ambiguities - In Text Contradiction definition.

perturbation.original_text: The undersigned acknowledge that each shall be responsible for the timely filing of such amendments and for the completeness and accuracy of the information concerning him or it contained herein or therein, but shall not be responsible for the completeness and accuracy of the information concerning the others, except to the extent that he or it knows or has reason to believe that such information is inaccurate.
perturbation.changed_text: The undersigned acknowledge that each shall endeavor to be responsible for the timely filing of such amendments and for the completeness and accuracy of the information concerning him or it contained herein or therein, but shall only be partially responsible for the completeness and accuracy of the information concerning the others, irrespective of whether he or it knows or has reason to believe that such information is inaccurate.
perturbation.explanation: Replacing 'shall be responsible' with 'shall endeavor to be responsible' weakens the obligation for timely filing. Changing 'shall not be responsible' to 'shall only be partially responsible, irrespective of whether he or it knows or has reason to believe that such information is inaccurate' introduces ambiguity about the extent of responsibility for others' information. Originally there was no responsibility now it's partial responsibility leading to a in-text contradiction on the extend of accountability, and if there is actually any
perturbation.contradicted_text: JOINT FILING STATEMENT PURSUANT TO RULE 13d-1(k) The undersigned acknowledge and agree that the foregoing statement on this Schedule 13G may be filed on behalf of each of the undersigned and that all subsequent amendments to this statement on Schedule 13G may be filed on behalf of each of the undersigned with the option, but not requirement of filing additional joint acquisition statements. The undersigned acknowledge that each shall endeavor to be responsible for the timely filing of such amendments and for the completeness and accuracy of the information concerning him or it contained herein or therein, but shall only be partially responsible for the completeness and accuracy of the information concerning the others, irrespective of whether he or it knows or has reason to believe that such information is inaccurate. DATED: April 8, 2020 SCULPTOR CAPITAL LP By: /s/ Thomas Sipp Thomas Sipp Chief Financial Officer SCULPTOR CAPITAL HOLDING CORPORATION By: /s/ Thomas Sipp Thomas Sipp Chief Financial Officer SCULPTOR MANAGEMENT, INC. By: /s/ Thomas Sipp Thomas Sipp Chief Financial Officer SCULPTOR MASTER FUND LTD By: /s/ Thomas Sipp Thomas Sipp Chief Financial Officer
perturbation.justification: The original text stated a clear responsibility for filing amendments and information accuracy, with a specific exception for information concerning others (unless there was knowledge of inaccuracy). The changed text weakens the responsibility for timely filing by using 'endeavor to be responsible' and introduces ambiguity about the extent of responsibility for others' information, stating it is 'partially responsible, irrespective of whether he or it knows or has reason to believe that such information is inaccurate'. This directly contradicts the original clear allocation of responsibility and lack of responsibility, creating an in-text contradiction regarding the extent of accountability, and if there is actually any.

perturbation.changed_text: DATED: April 8, 2020, or nearest business day
perturbation.explanation: Adding 'or nearest business day' introduces a contradiction regarding the effective date. The document is explicitly dated April 8, 2020, but the added phrase suggests that the actual effective date could be different, leading to questions about compliance and deadlines that hinge on the filing date.
perturbation.contradicted_text: JOINT FILING STATEMENT PURSUANT TO RULE 13d-1(k) The undersigned acknowledge and agree that the foregoing statement on this Schedule 13G may be filed on behalf of each of the undersigned and that all subsequent amendments to this statement on Schedule 13G may be filed on behalf of each of the undersigned with the option, but not requirement of filing additional joint acquisition statements. The undersigned acknowledge that each shall endeavor to be responsible for the timely filing of such amendments and for the completeness and accuracy of the information concerning him or it contained herein or therein, but shall only be partially responsible for the completeness and accuracy of the information concerning the others, irrespective of whether he or it knows or has reason to believe that such information is inaccurate. DATED: April 8, 2020, or nearest business day SCULPTOR CAPITAL LP By: /s/ Thomas Sipp Thomas Sipp Chief Financial Officer SCULPTOR CAPITAL HOLDING CORPORATION By: /s/ Thomas Sipp Thomas Sipp Chief Financial Officer SCULPTOR MANAGEMENT, INC. By: /s/ Thomas Sipp Thomas Sipp Chief Financial Officer SCULPTOR MASTER FUND LTD By: /s/ Thomas Sipp Thomas Sipp Chief Financial Officer
perturbation.justification: The addition of 'or nearest business day' creates a clear in-text contradiction, because it makes it unclear which date governs the agreement, creating ambiguity regarding the effective date and the required filing date. This follows the definition of Ambiguities - In Text Contradiction. The document says 'DATED: April 8, 2020' in both the changed text and the contradicted text, but the added clause introduces uncertainty where there was none previously. The contradiction is strong, obvious, and likely to cause confusion, and could lead to legal issues by making the date that it was to be filed unclear.
